environment_variables.name: TOKEN_USAGE_CODEX_ROOT
environment_variables.description: Override the Codex session root directory.

environment_variables.name: TOKEN_USAGE_CLAUDE_TRANSCRIPT_ROOT
environment_variables.description: Override the Claude transcript directory.

environment_variables.name: TOKEN_USAGE_CLAUDE_LOCAL_AGENT_ROOT
environment_variables.description: Override the Claude local-agent-mode-sessions directory.

environment_variables.name: TOKEN_USAGE_CLAUDE_DESKTOP_ROOT
environment_variables.description: Override the Claude Desktop app-data directory.

environment_variables.name: TOKEN_USAGE_MINIMAX_AGENT_ROOT
environment_variables.description: Override the MiniMax Agent desktop data directory.

environment_variables.description: Override the Kimi Desktop app-data directory.

environment_variables.description: Override the Qwen / DashScope desktop app-data directory.

environment_variables.description: Override the Doubao desktop app-data directory.

environment_variables.description: Override the Perplexity desktop app-data directory.

environment_variables.description: Override the DeepSeek desktop app-data directory.

environment_variables.description: Override the Baidu Qianfan / Wenxin desktop app-data directory.

environment_variables.name: TOKEN_USAGE_YUANBAO_DESKTOP_ROOT
environment_variables.description: Override the Tencent Yuanbao desktop app-data directory.
environment_variables.default: /Users/runner/Library/Application Support/Yuanbao,/Users/runner/Library/Application Support/Tencent Yuanbao,/Users/runner/Library/Application Support/元宝,/Users/runner/Library/Application Support/腾讯元宝

environment_variables.description: Override the StepFun desktop app-data directory.

environment_variables.description: Override the SenseNova desktop app-data directory.

environment_variables.description: Override the Baichuan desktop app-data directory.

environment_variables.description: Override the SiliconFlow desktop app-data directory.

environment_variables.description: Override the Spark / Xinghuo desktop app-data directory.

environment_variables.description: Override the ChatGPT desktop app-data directory.

environment_variables.description: Override the Gemini desktop app-data directory.

environment_variables.description: Override the Grok desktop app-data directory.

environment_variables.description: Override the Mistral / Le Chat desktop app-data directory.

environment_variables.name: TOKEN_USAGE_QWEN_CODE_ROOT
environment_variables.description: Override the Qwen Code CLI runtime root (~/.qwen or QWEN_RUNTIME_DIR).

environment_variables.name: TOKEN_USAGE_KIMI_CLI_ROOT
environment_variables.description: Override the Kimi CLI share root (~/.kimi or KIMI_SHARE_DIR).

environment_variables.name: TOKEN_USAGE_GEMINI_CLI_ROOT
environment_variables.description: Override the Gemini CLI runtime root (~/.gemini).

environment_variables.name: TOKEN_USAGE_OPENCODE_BIN
environment_variables.description: Override the OpenCode CLI executable used for session export and stats.

environment_variables.name: TOKEN_USAGE_OPENCODE_ROOTS
environment_variables.description: Comma-separated OpenCode roots to scan for local logs, storage, and desktop state.

environment_variables.name: TOKEN_USAGE_GENERIC_LOG_GLOBS
environment_variables.description: Comma-separated JSON/JSONL glob patterns for OpenAI/Anthropic-compatible exact usage logs.

environment_variables.name: TOKEN_USAGE_DISCOVERY_ROOTS
environment_variables.description: Comma-separated roots for auto-discovering generic API usage logs when they do not live in standard locations.

environment_variables.name: TOKEN_USAGE_CACHE_ROOT
environment_variables.description: Override the token-usage-universal incremental cache directory.

next_steps: 如 Codex 日志不在默认位置，请设置 TOKEN_USAGE_CODEX_ROOT 后重试 health。

Claude 要拿 exact，需要 local-agent-mode-sessions 下存在带 total_tokens + executor_end/grader_end 的 JSON（旧版常见 timing.json）；mac 默认在 ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/local-agent-mode-sessions，Windows 默认在 %APPDATA%\Claude\local-agent-mode-sessions，路径不同就设 TOKEN_USAGE_CLAUDE_LOCAL_AGENT_ROOT。
Claude Desktop 目前走桌面端 Chromium Cache_Data / IndexedDB 原生诊断；mac 默认在 ~/Library/Application Support/Claude，路径不同就设 TOKEN_USAGE_CLAUDE_DESKTOP_ROOT。
OpenCode 现在会优先读本地 storage/session + storage/message 里的 assistant token JSON，CLI export 仍保留为 fallback；如本地 roots 不在默认位置，请设置 TOKEN_USAGE_OPENCODE_ROOTS；如 CLI 不在 PATH，再补 TOKEN_USAGE_OPENCODE_BIN。
MiniMax Agent 目前走桌面端 Chromium Cache_Data exact 解析；mac 默认在 ~/Library/Application Support/MiniMax Agent，Windows 常见在 %APPDATA%\MiniMax Agent，路径不同就设 TOKEN_USAGE_MINIMAX_AGENT_ROOT。

Kimi / GLM / Qwen / DeepSeek / Doubao / Qianfan / Yuanbao / Perplexity / StepFun / SenseNova / Baichuan / SiliconFlow / Spark / ChatGPT / Gemini / Grok / Mistral 这批桌面端已接入原生 Chromium/Electron exact 解析器；现在会同时读取 Cache_Data、IndexedDB 和 Local Storage；如果默认 app-data 目录没命中，请按来源分别设置 TOKEN_USAGE_KIMI_DESKTOP_ROOT, TOKEN_USAGE_GLM_DESKTOP_ROOT, TOKEN_USAGE_QWEN_DESKTOP_ROOT, TOKEN_USAGE_DEEPSEEK_DESKTOP_ROOT, TOKEN_USAGE_DOUBAO_DESKTOP_ROOT, TOKEN_USAGE_QIANFAN_DESKTOP_ROOT, TOKEN_USAGE_YUANBAO_DESKTOP_ROOT, TOKEN_USAGE_PERPLEXITY_DESKTOP_ROOT, TOKEN_USAGE_STEPFUN_DESKTOP_ROOT, TOKEN_USAGE_SENSENOVA_DESKTOP_ROOT, TOKEN_USAGE_BAICHUAN_DESKTOP_ROOT, TOKEN_USAGE_SILICONFLOW_DESKTOP_ROOT, TOKEN_USAGE_SPARK_DESKTOP_ROOT, TOKEN_USAGE_CHATGPT_DESKTOP_ROOT, TOKEN_USAGE_GEMINI_DESKTOP_ROOT, TOKEN_USAGE_GROK_DESKTOP_ROOT, TOKEN_USAGE_MISTRAL_DESKTOP_ROOT。
Qwen Code CLI 现在会直接读官方 session JSONL；默认根目录跟随 ~/.qwen 或上游 QWEN_RUNTIME_DIR，如果位置不同可设置 TOKEN_USAGE_QWEN_CODE_ROOT。
Kimi CLI 现在会直接读官方 ~/.kimi/sessions/*/*/wire.jsonl；默认根目录跟随 ~/.kimi 或上游 KIMI_SHARE_DIR，如果位置不同可设置 TOKEN_USAGE_KIMI_CLI_ROOT。
Gemini CLI 现在会直接读官方 ~/.gemini/tmp/*/chats/session-*.json；exact token 来自每条 Gemini assistant message 的 tokens 字段，如果位置不同可设置 TOKEN_USAGE_GEMINI_CLI_ROOT。
如要接入通用 API exact 日志，优先确认常见目录是否已自动发现；若日志不在标准位置，请设置 TOKEN_USAGE_GENERIC_LOG_GLOBS 或 TOKEN_USAGE_DISCOVERY_ROOTS。

如果您统计的是 IDE、内网 launcher 或任何支持自定义 base_url 的客户端，先运行 `python3 scripts/token_usage.py ingress profiles` 看可用生态，再运行 `python3 scripts/token_usage.py ingress bootstrap --profile deepseek --editor vscode` 拿 IDE/CLI 样板配置，最后用 `python3 scripts/token_usage.py ingress serve ...` 启动 companion。
先运行 sources 看来源状态，再运行 report --today 拿今日主结论。
